name_cn:
Genuine Grade
CELIN.E 23 New Ava TRIOMPHE Calfskin Handbag
This time Ava adds a metal Triomphe logo buckle, making it more exquisite and beautiful 💓~ Soft calfskin and crescent moon appearance 🌙 Full texture, comes with retro fashion sense. Magnetic C-closure Triomphe flap design, interpreting French retro romance. The whole bag is lightweight yet structured 💯 Daily versatile and commuter ready ✨
Calfskin, calfskin lining, shoulder and handheld, zip closure, leather flap, full steel TRIOMPHE magnetic clasp, 1 interior flat pocket, adjustable shoulder strap, min length 22cm, max length 23cm
Size: 23 X 13.5 X 6cm
No.: 114492BZJ.04LU
